name: counsel
description: COUNSEL legal workflow framework: matter intake, research, analysis, drafting, verification, and review.

interface.shortDescription: Structured legal workflow: intake, research, draft, verify, review.
interface.longDescription: COUNSEL is a disciplined legal workflow framework. It scaffolds a per-matter workspace and a sequence of skills (intake, strategize, research, analyze, draft, verify, review, deliver) backed by IRAC/CREAC analysis, citation verification, and a no-placeholders rule. Bundles the Legalcode MCP server for primary-source retrieval.
defaultPrompt: Open a new matter and run intake
Draft the brief from the analysis
